Beyond the Catalogue

Customized Orders

Two ways we go the extra mile for you

📏
Bigger Sizes

Your Child Outgrew Size 7?
We've Got You! 💕

Our priority collection is lovingly crafted for ages 0–7 years. But growing kids deserve beautiful clothes too — we stitch bigger sizes under our customized category.

⭐ Main range: Ages 0–7 yrs — fixed price, ready to order
✂️ Bigger sizes: Above 7 yrs — customized stitching on request
💬 Prices not fixed — we share the best price once you send your measurements
Ask About Bigger Sizes
✏️
Custom Design

Love Our Fabric,
Want Your Own Design? 🎨

You've seen our premium lawn prints — now imagine them stitched in a style you choose. Just share a design photo with us and we'll stitch it from our fabric in your style.

🌿 We use our premium branded lawn fabrics
🖼️ You share a design photo on WhatsApp
✂️ Our tailor replicates the style on your chosen fabric
💬 Price shared after reviewing the design complexity
Share a Design on WhatsApp
